column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One SQANTI3 run per line.
# Use with: tjp-batch sqanti3 samplesheet.csv --config base_config.yaml
# Each row submits one SQANTI3 run against a different isoform GTF input.
# from the base config and applied to all samples in the batch.
#   sample      - unique sample identifier (used in output directory and filenames)
#   coverage    - STAR SJ.out.tab file for short-read junction support (leave blank to skip)
#   fl_count    - transcript abundance file from featureCounts or similar
# Optional: Titan integration (leave blank if not yet configured)
